panels.description: Total number of HTTP requests handled by the Gateway, grouped by resource type, request type, request method and status code.
panels.title: Total Requests

panels.description: Number of currently active (in-progress) HTTP requests between Client and Gateway.
panels.title: Active Requests

panels.description: Percentile duration of HTTP requests between Client and Gateway, grouped by resource type and request type.
panels.title: Request Duration

panels.description: Average request durations between Client and Gateway, grouped by resource type, request type, request method and status code.

targets.expr: sum by(code, type, method, resource_type) (rate(twingate_gateway_http_request_duration_seconds_sum[5m])) / (sum by(code, type, method, resource_type) (rate(twingate_gateway_http_request_duration_seconds_count[5m])))

panels.title: Request Duration (Average)

panels.description: Percentile size of HTTP requests by Client, grouped by resource type and request type.
panels.title: Request Size (Percentile)

panels.description: Average size of HTTP requests by Client, grouped by resource type, request type, request method and status code.

targets.expr: sum by(code, method, type, resource_type) (rate(twingate_gateway_http_request_size_bytes_sum[5m])) / (sum by(code, method, type, resource_type) (rate(twingate_gateway_http_request_size_bytes_count[5m])))

panels.title: Request Size (Average)

panels.description: Percentile size of HTTP responses handled by Gateway, grouped by resource type and request type.
panels.title: Response Size (Percentile)

panels.description: Average size of HTTP response handled by Gateway, grouped by resource type, request type, request method and status code.

targets.expr: sum by(code, method, type, resource_type) (rate(twingate_gateway_http_response_size_bytes_sum[5m])) / (sum by(code, method, type, resource_type) (rate(twingate_gateway_http_response_size_bytes_count[5m])))

panels.title: Response Size (Average)

panels.description: Total number of HTTP requests handled by the Kubernetes API Server, grouped by request type, method and status code.
panels.title: Total Requests

panels.description: Number of currently active (in-progress) HTTP requests to Kubernetes API server.
panels.title: Active Requests

panels.description: Percentile duration of HTTP requests to Kubernetes API Server, grouped by request type.
panels.title: Request Duration (Percentile)

panels.description: Average duration of HTTP requests to the Kubernetes API Server, grouped by request type, request method and status code.

targets.expr: sum by(code, type, method) (rate(twingate_gateway_api_server_request_duration_seconds_sum{resource_type="kubernetes"}[5m])) / (sum by(code, type, method) (rate(twingate_gateway_api_server_request_duration_seconds_count{resource_type="kubernetes"}[5m])))

panels.title: Request Duration (Average)

panels.description: Total number of HTTP requests handled by the Web App Server, grouped by request type, method and status code.

panels.title: Active Requests

panels.description: Percentile duration of HTTP requests to the Web App Server, grouped by request type.
panels.title: Request Duration (Percentile)

panels.description: Average duration of HTTP requests to the Web App Server, grouped by request type, request method and status code.

targets.expr: sum by(code, type, method) (rate(twingate_gateway_api_server_request_duration_seconds_sum{resource_type="web_app"}[5m])) / (sum by(code, type, method) (rate(twingate_gateway_api_server_request_duration_seconds_count{resource_type="web_app"}[5m])))

panels.title: Request Duration (Average)
